name: nerdygeek
description: Auto-discover official framework documentation with version-aware retrieval and deterministic validation.
long_description: NerdyGeek is a documentation intelligence MCP server for Claude Desktop. It detects frameworks from a query and optional package.json context, discovers official documentation dynamically, resolves the most relevant version, retrieves and ranks authoritative content, and returns a deterministic structured answer through the search_docs tool.

tools.name: search_docs
tools.description: Search official documentation for frameworks and libraries with version-aware retrieval.
